hero.label: NOCTRA SEO/GEO — SEARCH INTELLIGENCE
hero.headline:
Understand how your
audience finds you.
hero.subheadline: A lightweight tracker on your site. Real SEO, speed and AI visibility metrics. Recommendations that explain the problem, the impact and how to fix it.
hero.trustLine: ✦ Google Search Console  ·  ✦ ChatGPT  ·  ✦ Gemini  ·  ✦ Perplexity

problem.label: THE PROBLEM
problem.heading:
It's not that you have no traffic.
You just don't know why.

pairs.problem: You installed Google Analytics but the reports don't tell you what to do.
pairs.solution: Noctra SEO translates metrics into concrete actions prioritized by impact.

pairs.problem: Your Core Web Vitals fail but you don't know what's causing the slowness.
pairs.solution: The tracker measures real CWV from the user's browser — not estimates.

pairs.problem: Your pages have SEO issues you can't see without manual auditing.
pairs.solution: Each visit detects issues in real time: titles, metas, H1, schema, canonical.

pairs.problem: You don't know if appearing in ChatGPT or Perplexity affects your business.
pairs.solution: The GEO module measures your visibility in AI engines and tells you how to improve it.

pairs.problem: You receive alerts that something failed. Without context on what to do.
pairs.solution: Each alert includes Claude's analysis: impact, root cause and steps to resolve it.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.heading: One script. Real data. AI that interprets.

steps.title: Install the tracker (30 seconds)
steps.desc: Add one line of code to your site. Compatible with any platform: HTML, WordPress, Shopify, Next.js. No cookies, no performance impact. The script weighs less than 8KB.

steps.title: Real data from the first pageview
steps.desc: The tracker captures on-page SEO signals, real Core Web Vitals from the user's browser, behavior and traffic channel — on every visit.

steps.title: Automatic issue detection
steps.desc: Each pageview evaluates the page against 15 SEO rules. Issues are classified by severity and accumulated with real traffic data to prioritize what to fix first.

steps.title: Intelligent alerts with Claude
steps.desc: When a metric drops, Claude analyzes your business context and generates: what happened, why it matters for your industry, and how to resolve it step by step.

steps.title: Dashboard with actionable recommendations
steps.desc: Everything in one place: historical metrics, prioritized issues, keywords from Search Console, and visibility score in ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity.

demo.label: THE DASHBOARD
demo.heading: Metrics that explain. Actions that resolve.
demo.subheading: You don't just see what's happening. You see why it matters and what to do about it.

features.label: FEATURES
features.heading: Everything you need to understand your search presence.

alerts.label: INTELLIGENT ALERTS
alerts.heading:
You don't just know something failed.
You know exactly what to do.
alerts.para1: Most tools send you a notification saying 'your LCP exceeded the threshold'. No context. No solution.
alerts.para2: Noctra SEO uses Claude to analyze each alert with your business context: what type of company you are, which are your critical pages, and what goals you have configured.

channels.email: Email — immediate critical alerts + daily digest
channels.whatsapp: WhatsApp — for those who need to know right away
channels.slack: Slack — direct integration to your team channel

comparativa.label: COMPARISON
comparativa.heading: Not another metrics dashboard.
comparativa.subheading: The difference is whether the tool interprets the data or leaves you alone with it.
rows: SEO issue detection on every visit

forWho.label: FOR WHO
forWho.heading: For those who need to understand their search, not just measure it.

cards.title: Digital agencies
cards.challenge: Managing SEO for multiple clients with different sites, industries and goals.
cards.solution: One tracker per domain. Alerts per client. PDF reports ready to present.

cards.title: SMBs with web presence
cards.challenge: They have a working site but don't know if SEO is working for them or against them.
cards.solution: Real visibility without needing to be an SEO expert. AI explains everything in business language.

cards.title: Independent professionals
cards.challenge: Doctors, lawyers, accountants who need to rank locally but don't have a technical team.
cards.solution: Install the tracker in 30 seconds. Receive intelligent alerts with clear steps to resolve them.

cards.title: Startups and SaaS
cards.challenge: Site speed and technical SEO directly affect organic CAC. They can't afford to ignore it.
cards.solution: Real CWV + technical issues detected automatically. Data for fast decisions.

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.heading: Early access — internal use.
pricing.note: Noctra SEO is currently in internal use at Noctra Studio. If you want early access for your agency or business, reach out directly.

cta.label: START TODAY
cta.heading:
Your site already has data.
It just needs someone to interpret it.
cta.subheading: Install the tracker in 30 seconds. The first data arrives with the first visit.
